prd_refs: PRD §16 v0.4 enterprise policy file support (line 2944)
description: Support an admin-managed enterprise policy file (e.g. `/etc/slashops/policy.json` on Linux, `%ProgramData%\SlashOps\policy.json` on Windows). Enterprise policy merges into the effective policy with the highest precedence among file layers (above user policy), per §17 Q8.
notes: Enterprise file path differs by platform; document both in `docs/CONFIGURATION.md`.
steps: TDD: Enterprise policy file loaded when present.
TDD: Enterprise policy overrides user policy where configured.
TDD: Enterprise policy cannot be weakened by user / project.
TDD: Missing enterprise file is silently skipped.
Update precedence layer in `cfg-07` (effective config merge).
name: [ma-05] Enterprise policy file support
